title: Only one replacing "Red Team Lab" framing with "Murano Prism Room" world doctrine
public_claim: This is the doctrine-shifting handoff — the one sibling that replaces the old "Red Team Lab" framing with a new world-design vision called the Murano Prism Room / Ambient Verification doctrine.
distinctive_mechanism: It converts an archive or handoff into three inspectable decisions: what the work product is for, which component pieces carry the work, and what action would turn it into a live room, paper, method, or software instrument.
use_value: It supports multi-perspective review: the same material can be inspected through competing lenses before it hardens into a public claim.
